GENERAL.description: Fallback subcategory when a more specific mapping is unavailable.

MOVIE.description: Movie theaters and cinema ticket scenarios.

THEME_PARK.description: Theme parks, amusement parks, and similar attraction tickets.

SINGING.description: KTV, karaoke venues, and singing-related entertainment.

LIVE_EVENT.description: Live performances, concerts, exhibitions, and stage events.

STREAMING.description: Streaming media and recurring digital entertainment services.

DELIVERY.description: Food-delivery platforms and delivery-specific dining scenarios.

CAFE.description: Coffee shops, cafes, and beverage-focused merchants.

HOTEL_DINING.description: Dining offers tied to hotels, buffets, or hotel-operated restaurants.

DEPARTMENT.description: Department stores and department-store-like shopping malls.

WAREHOUSE.description: Warehouse clubs, hypermarkets, and bulk-shopping chains.

DRUGSTORE.description: Drugstores, cosmetics, and personal-care retail chains.

ECOMMERCE.description: Domestic ecommerce and mainstream online-shopping platforms.

SUBSCRIPTION.description: Recurring subscription, auto-renewal, or membership billing.

INTERNATIONAL_ECOMMERCE.description: Cross-border ecommerce and international online marketplaces.

AI_TOOL.description: AI tools and productivity software subscriptions.

RIDESHARE.description: Ride-hailing, taxi-dispatch, and short-term vehicle rental services.

AIRLINE.description: Airline ticketing and airline-operated booking scenarios.

TRAVEL_PLATFORM.description: Travel booking and accommodation aggregator platforms.

TRAVEL_AGENCY.description: Travel agencies and package-tour booking channels.

OVERSEAS_IN_STORE.description: Foreign in-store spending, including overseas restaurant and on-site hotel payments.

EV_CHARGING.description: Electric-vehicle charging stations and charging-network spend.

SUPERMARKET.description: Supermarkets, grocery chains, and hypermarket grocery scenarios.
